articles.title: Hormel (HRL) Stock Could Be A Bargain On Cash Flow But Full On Earnings

articles.title: Is Hormel’s New Pepperoni Snack Bites Push a Meaningful Step in Modernizing the HRL Story?
articles.summary: Hormel Foods recently introduced HORMEL Pepperoni Snack Bites, a refrigerated protein snack available in Original, Parmesan and Dill Pickle flavors, now rolling out in select retailers’ deli and refrigerated snack sections across the US.
